bead.title: runs: Run detail resolver + normalized tool-call persistence + bundle-file confinement
bead.description: Backend: Run detail resolver returning prompt, response, stderr, toolCalls, bundleFiles, bundleFile (download). Persist ToolCallEntry at drain time (NOT log-parsing per codex). Bundle-file confinement: path-traversal hardening.
bead.acceptance: 1. Run resolver returns full detail (lossless). 2. ToolCallEntry persisted at drain time; tests cover. 3. bundleFile endpoint refuses path traversal. 4. Tests cover all three.
